allow: Bash(curl -H "Authorization: bearer $\(gh auth token\)" -X POST -d '{"query":"query { __type\(name: \\"User\\"\) { fields { name description } } }"}' https://api.github.com/graphql)
Bash(curl -H "Authorization: bearer $\(gh auth token\)" -X POST -d '{"query":"{ viewer { copilotEndpoints } }"}' https://api.github.com/graphql)

Bash(curl -H "Authorization: bearer $\(gh auth token\)" -X POST -d '{"query":"query { __type\(name: \\"CopilotEndpoints\\"\) { fields { name description type { name } } } }"}' https://api.github.com/graphql)
Bash(curl -H "Authorization: bearer $\(gh auth token\)" -X POST -d '{"query":"{ viewer { copilotEndpoints { api proxy telemetry originTracker } } }"}' https://api.github.com/graphql)
Bash(curl -H "Authorization: bearer $\(gh auth token\)" -X POST -d '{"query":"query { __schema { queryType { fields { name description } } } }"}' https://api.github.com/graphql)
